description_long: This is an electric guitar with a solid, contoured body finished in a vibrant blue color. The front features a brown pickguard with three white single-coil pickups, a set of white control knobs, and a metallic bridge. The neck is long and slender, made of a lighter wood, and is fitted with white fret markers along a dark fingerboard. The headstock is angled and houses six tuning pegs arranged in a single row, typical of classic electric guitar designs. The back of the guitar is smooth and unadorned, with the blue finish wrapping around the entire body. This instrument is designed for performance and is commonly seen in urban environments such as music venues, street performances, and garages.
description: A blue-bodied electric guitar with a brown pickguard, white pickups, and a long wooden neck with a single-row headstock. It features classic electric guitar hardware and a sleek, contoured design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue contoured body, brown pickguard, and the full length of the neck and headstock.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the fretboard, white pickups, control knobs, and the single-row tuning pegs on the headstock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blue body, brown pickguard, and the neck extending outward.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the face of the guitar, including the pickups, control knobs, and the full fretboard.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, and a classic contoured shape.
